notes: Stopped crashing after setting PROTON_USE_WINED3D, but FPS is too low to play a fast-paced game, specially considering the minimum specs. The controller seems stuck on walking to the right.
title: The King's Bird

notes: Runs out of the box but with poor performance 35ish FPS at 1080p, with vsync disabled and frameskip 0 it is boarderline tolerable. Controller input is broken, usually stuck in a direction and sometimes does not respond at all except in menues (people have reported similar issues on windows too though).
title: The King's Bird

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Runs, but input is laggy and imprecise to the point that it's not comfortably playable.
title: The King's Bird

notes: Game runs but with poor performance, around 45fps at 2560x1600 resolution with Proton 4.11-1. Performance does not appear to scale with resolutions. Nintendo Switch Pro Controller is not detected.
title: The King's Bird

notes: With Mesa ACO drivers and with launch option "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%", the performance is still bad (considering the low requirements of the game). Not much difference with any game settings or resolutions, framerate is at best around 50fps.
title: The King's Bird
